question.short: What are the effects of sexual education on children?
question.long: What are the effects of sexual education programs on children?

description: Results from studies evaluating the benefit-risk balance of sexual education programs for children aimed at preventing child sexual abuse.

no_consensus.description: The literature has not yet reached a consensus on the effects of sexual education programs

negative.description: The literature suggests that sexual education programs mostly have negative effects on children

towards_negative.description: The literature suggests that sexual education programs may have negative effects on children, but more research is needed

no_effect.description: The literature suggests that sexual education programs have no significant effect on children

towards_positive.description: The literature suggests that sexual education programs may have positive effects on children, but more research is needed

positive.description: The literature suggests that sexual education programs mostly have positive effects on children

negative.description: The results of the paper suggest that the AI systems tested mostly have a negative impact on education

negative_unlike_literature.description: The results of the paper suggest that the AI systems tested mostly have a negative impact on education, unlike what is reported in the literature

negative_but_small_effect.description: The results of the paper suggest that the AI systems tested may have a small negative impact on education

negative_but_low_confidence.description: The results of the paper suggest that the AI systems tested may have a negative impact on education, but the evidence is not strong

negative_but_mixed.description: The results of the paper suggest that the AI systems tested mostly have a negative impact on education, but can also have positive effects

mixed.description: The results of the paper suggest that the AI systems tested have both positive and negative impacts on education

no_effect.description: The results of the paper suggest that the AI systems tested have no significant impact on education

positive_but_mixed.description: The results of the paper suggest that the AI systems tested mostly have a positive impact on education, but can also have negative effects

positive_but_low_confidence.description: The results of the paper suggest that the AI systems tested may have a positive impact on education, but the evidence is not strong

positive_but_small_effect.description: The results of the paper suggest that the AI systems tested may have a small positive impact on education

positive_unlike_literature.description: The results of the paper suggest that the AI systems tested mostly have a positive impact on education, unlike what is reported in the literature

positive.description: The results of the paper suggest that the AI systems tested mostly have a positive impact on education

papers.title: A systematic review of literature reviews on artificial intelligence in education (AIED): a roadmap to a future research agenda
papers.quote: The analysis of AIED literature reviews has identifed signifcant advantages that AIED can bring to education. At the same time, there are various challenges that need the attention of researchers and practitioners

notes.title: Editorial board members
notes.description: Two of the paper's authors serve on the journal's editorial board, which could influence publication decisions

papers.title: Artificial intelligence in education: A systematic literature review
papers.quote: Several studies have highlighted the significant positive impact of AI technology on students’ academic performance

papers.title: The impact of large language models on higher education: exploring the connection between AI and Education 4.0
papers.quote: The findings underscore the significant potential of LLMs to enrich higher education, aligning with Education 4.0 by fostering more autonomous, collaborative, and interactive learning

papers.title: The effect of ChatGPT on students’ learning performance, learning perception, and higher-order thinking: insights from a meta-analysis
papers.quote: The results indicate that ChatGPT has a large positive impact on improving learning performance
